1→namespace Frank.Cli.Core.Commands
     2→
     3→open System
     4→open System.Collections.Generic
     5→open System.IO
     6→open VDS.RDF
     7→open FSharp.Compiler.CodeAnalysis
     8→open FSharp.Compiler.Syntax
     9→open Frank.Cli.Core.Rdf
    10→open Frank.Cli.Core.Rdf.Vocabularies
    11→open Frank.Cli.Core.Analysis
    12→open Frank.Cli.Core.Extraction
    13→open Frank.Cli.Core.State
    14→
    15→type private StateSourceLocation = Frank.Cli.Core.State.SourceLocation
    16→
    17→/// Orchestrates the extract command: AST analysis -> type mapping -> state persistence.
    18→module ExtractCommand =
    19→
    20→    type OntologySummary =
    21→        { ClassCount: int
    22→          PropertyCount: int
    23→          AlignedCount: int
    24→          UnalignedCount: int }
    25→
    26→    type ShapesSummary =
    27→        { ShapeCount: int
    28→          ConstraintCount: int }
    29→
    30→    type ExtractResult =
    31→        { OntologySummary: OntologySummary
    32→          ShapesSummary: ShapesSummary
    33→          UnmappedTypes: UnmappedType list
    34→          StateFilePath: string }
    35→
    36→    /// Dependency injection record for pipeline steps, enabling testability.
    37→    type ExtractPipeline = {
    38→        LoadProject: string -> Async<Result<LoadedProject, string>>
    39→        AnalyzeAst: ParsedInput list -> AnalyzedResource list
    40→        AnalyzeTypes: FSharpCheckProjectResults -> AnalyzedType list
    41→        MapTypes: TypeMapper.MappingConfig -> AnalyzedType list -> IGraph
    42→        MapRoutes: TypeMapper.MappingConfig -> AnalyzedResource list -> AnalyzedType list -> IGraph
    43→        MapCapabilities: TypeMapper.MappingConfig -> AnalyzedResource list -> IGraph
    44→        GenerateShapes: TypeMapper.MappingConfig -> AnalyzedType list -> IGraph
    45→        AlignVocabularies: TypeMapper.MappingConfig -> IGraph -> IGraph
    46→        SaveState: string -> ExtractionState -> Result<unit, string>
    47→    }
    48→
    49→    /// Default pipeline using the real implementations.
    50→    let defaultPipeline : ExtractPipeline = {
    51→        LoadProject = ProjectLoader.loadProject
    52→        AnalyzeAst = AstAnalyzer.analyzeFiles
    53→        AnalyzeTypes = TypeAnalyzer.analyzeTypes
    54→        MapTypes = TypeMapper.mapTypes
    55→        MapRoutes = RouteMapper.mapRoutes
    56→        MapCapabilities = CapabilityMapper.mapCapabilities
    57→        GenerateShapes = ShapeGenerator.generateShapes
    58→        AlignVocabularies = VocabularyAligner.alignVocabularies
    59→        SaveState = ExtractionState.save
    60→    }
    61→
    62→    let private countByType (graph: IGraph) (typeUri: Uri) : int =
    63→        let rdfTypeNode = createUriNode graph (Uri Rdf.Type)
    64→        let typeNode = createUriNode graph typeUri
    65→        triplesWithPredicate graph rdfTypeNode
    66→        |> Seq.filter (fun t ->
    67→            match t.Object with
    68→            | :? IUriNode as on -> on.Uri = typeUri
    69→            | _ -> false)
    70→        |> Seq.length
    71→
    72→    let private mergeGraphs (target: IGraph) (source: IGraph) =
    73→        for triple in source.Triples do
    74→            let s =
    75→                match triple.Subject with
    76→                | :? IUriNode as u -> createUriNode target u.Uri
    77→                | :? IBlankNode as b -> createBlankNode target b.InternalID
    78→                | n -> n
    79→            let p =
    80→                match triple.Predicate with
    81→                | :? IUriNode as u -> createUriNode target u.Uri
    82→                | n -> n
    83→            let o =
    84→                match triple.Object with
    85→                | :? IUriNode as u -> createUriNode target u.Uri
    86→                | :? IBlankNode as b -> createBlankNode target b.InternalID
    87→                | :? ILiteralNode as l ->
    88→                    if isNull l.DataType then
    89→                        createLiteralNode target l.Value None
    90→                    else
    91→                        createLiteralNode target l.Value (Some l.DataType)
    92→                | n -> n
    93→            assertTriple target (s, p, o)
    94→
    95→    let private countAligned (graph: IGraph) : int =
    96→        let equivPropUri = Uri Owl.EquivalentProperty
    97→        let equivPropNode = createUriNode graph equivPropUri
    98→        triplesWithPredicate graph equivPropNode |> Seq.length
    99→
   100→    let private detectUnmappedTypes (analyzedTypes: AnalyzedType list) (ontologyGraph: IGraph) (config: TypeMapper.MappingConfig) : UnmappedType list =
   101→        analyzedTypes
   102→        |> List.choose (fun t ->
   103→            let classUri = Uri(config.BaseUri.ToString().TrimEnd('/') + "/types/" + t.ShortName)
   104→            let node = getNode ontologyGraph classUri
   105→            match node with
   106→            | None ->
   107→                let loc =
   108→                    t.SourceLocation
   109→                    |> Option.map (fun sl -> { File = sl.File; Line = sl.Line; Column = sl.Column } : StateSourceLocation)
   110→                    |> Option.defaultValue ({ File = "unknown"; Line = 0; Column = 0 } : StateSourceLocation)
   111→                Some { TypeName = t.FullName; Reason = "No OWL class generated"; Location = loc }
   112→            | Some _ -> None)
   113→
   114→    let executeWithPipeline (pipeline: ExtractPipeline) (projectPath: string) (baseUri: Uri) (vocabularies: string list) (scope: string) : Async<Result<ExtractResult, string>> =
   115→        async {
   116→            try
   117→                // Step 1: Load project
   118→                let! loadResult = pipeline.LoadProject projectPath
   119→                match loadResult with
   120→                | Error e -> return Error $"Failed to load project: {e}"
   121→                | Ok loaded ->
   122→
   123→                let config : TypeMapper.MappingConfig =
   124→                    { BaseUri = baseUri
   125→                      Vocabularies = vocabularies }
   126→
   127→                // Step 2: AST analysis
   128→                let parsedInputs = loaded.ParsedFiles |> List.map snd
   129→                let analyzedResources = pipeline.AnalyzeAst parsedInputs
   130→
   131→                // Step 3: Type analysis
   132→                let analyzedTypes = pipeline.AnalyzeTypes loaded.CheckResults
   133→
   134→                // Step 4: Type mapping
   135→                let typeGraph = pipeline.MapTypes config analyzedTypes
   136→
   137→                // Step 5: Route mapping
   138→                let routeGraph = pipeline.MapRoutes config analyzedResources analyzedTypes
   139→
   140→                // Step 6: Capability mapping
   141→                let capabilityGraph = pipeline.MapCapabilities config analyzedResources
   142→
   143→                // Step 7: Shape generation
   144→                let shapesGraph = pipeline.GenerateShapes config analyzedTypes
   145→
   146→                // Merge type, route, capability graphs into ontology
   147→                let ontologyGraph = createGraph ()
   148→                mergeGraphs ontologyGraph typeGraph
   149→                mergeGraphs ontologyGraph routeGraph
   150→                mergeGraphs ontologyGraph capabilityGraph
   151→
   152→                // Step 8: Vocabulary alignment
   153→                let alignedOntology = pipeline.AlignVocabularies config ontologyGraph
   154→
   155→                // Compute counts
   156→                let classCount = countByType alignedOntology (Uri Owl.Class)
   157→                let datatypePropCount = countByType alignedOntology (Uri Owl.DatatypeProperty)
   158→                let objectPropCount = countByType alignedOntology (Uri Owl.ObjectProperty)
   159→                let propertyCount = datatypePropCount + objectPropCount
   160→                let alignedCount = countAligned alignedOntology
   161→                let unalignedCount = propertyCount - alignedCount
   162→
   163→                let shapeCount = countByType shapesGraph (Uri Shacl.NodeShape)
   164→                let constraintCount =
   165→                    let shaclPropertyNode = createUriNode shapesGraph (Uri Shacl.Path)
   166→                    triplesWithPredicate shapesGraph shaclPropertyNode |> Seq.length
   167→
   168→                // Detect unmapped types
   169→                let unmappedTypes = detectUnmappedTypes analyzedTypes alignedOntology config
   170→
   171→                // Step 9: Persist state
   172→                let statePath = ExtractionState.defaultStatePath (Path.GetDirectoryName projectPath)
   173→                let sourceMap = Dictionary<Uri, StateSourceLocation>()
   174→
   175→                let state : ExtractionState =
   176→                    { Ontology = alignedOntology
   177→                      Shapes = shapesGraph
   178→                      SourceMap = sourceMap
   179→                      Clarifications = Map.empty
   180→                      Metadata =
   181→                        { Timestamp = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow
   182→                          SourceHash = ""
   183→                          ToolVersion = "0.1.0"
   184→                          BaseUri = baseUri
   185→                          Vocabularies = vocabularies }
   186→                      UnmappedTypes = unmappedTypes }
   187→
   188→                match pipeline.SaveState statePath state with
   189→                | Error e -> return Error $"Failed to save state: {e}"
   190→                | Ok () ->
   191→
   192→                return Ok
   193→                    { OntologySummary =
   194→                        { ClassCount = classCount
   195→                          PropertyCount = propertyCount
   196→                          AlignedCount = alignedCount
   197→                          UnalignedCount = unalignedCount }
   198→                      ShapesSummary =
   199→                        { ShapeCount = shapeCount
   200→                          ConstraintCount = constraintCount }
   201→                      UnmappedTypes = unmappedTypes
   202→                      StateFilePath = statePath }
   203→            with ex ->
   204→                return Error $"Extraction failed: {ex.Message}"
   205→        }
   206→
   207→    let execute (projectPath: string) (baseUri: Uri) (vocabularies: string list) (scope: string) : Async<Result<ExtractResult, string>> =
   208→        executeWithPipeline defaultPipeline projectPath baseUri vocabularies scope
   209→

1→namespace Frank.Cli.Core.Commands
     2→
     3→open System
     4→open System.IO
     5→open System.Security.Cryptography
     6→open VDS.RDF
     7→open Frank.Cli.Core.Rdf
     8→open Frank.Cli.Core.Rdf.Vocabularies
     9→open Frank.Cli.Core.State
    10→
    11→/// Validates completeness and consistency of extracted semantic definitions.
    12→module ValidateCommand =
    13→
    14→    type ValidationIssue =
    15→        { Severity: string
    16→          Message: string
    17→          Uri: Uri option }
    18→
    19→    type ValidateResult =
    20→        { Issues: ValidationIssue list
    21→          CoveragePercent: float
    22→          IsValid: bool }
    23→
    24→    let private uriEquals (a: Uri) (b: Uri) =
    25→        a.AbsoluteUri = b.AbsoluteUri
    26→
    27→    let private findOwlClasses (graph: IGraph) : Uri list =
    28→        let rdfTypeNode = createUriNode graph (Uri Rdf.Type)
    29→        let owlClassUri = Uri Owl.Class
    30→
    31→        triplesWithPredicate graph rdfTypeNode
    32→        |> Seq.filter (fun t ->
    33→            match t.Object with
    34→            | :? IUriNode as on -> uriEquals on.Uri owlClassUri
    35→            | _ -> false)
    36→        |> Seq.choose (fun t ->
    37→            match t.Subject with
    38→            | :? IUriNode as sn -> Some sn.Uri
    39→            | _ -> None)
    40→        |> Seq.toList
    41→
    42→    let private checkClassesHaveProperties (graph: IGraph) (classes: Uri list) : ValidationIssue list =
    43→        let domainNode = createUriNode graph (Uri Rdfs.Domain)
    44→
    45→        // Collect all URIs that appear as rdfs:domain objects (i.e., classes that have properties)
    46→        let classesWithProperties =
    47→            triplesWithPredicate graph domainNode
    48→            |> Seq.choose (fun t ->
    49→                match t.Object with
    50→                | :? IUriNode as on -> Some on.Uri.AbsoluteUri
    51→                | _ -> None)
    52→            |> Set.ofSeq
    53→
    54→        classes
    55→        |> List.choose (fun classUri ->
    56→            if classesWithProperties.Contains classUri.AbsoluteUri then
    57→                None
    58→            else
    59→                Some
    60→                    { Severity = "warning"
    61→                      Message = $"owl:Class '%s{classUri.AbsoluteUri}' has no properties (no rdfs:domain references it)"
    62→                      Uri = Some classUri })
    63→
    64→    let private checkShapeTargetClasses (ontology: IGraph) (shapes: IGraph) : ValidationIssue list =
    65→        let rdfTypeNode = createUriNode shapes (Uri Rdf.Type)
    66→        let nodeShapeUri = Uri Shacl.NodeShape
    67→        let targetClassNode = createUriNode shapes (Uri Shacl.TargetClass)
    68→
    69→        // Collect all owl:Class URIs from ontology
    70→        let ontologyClasses =
    71→            findOwlClasses ontology
    72→            |> List.map (fun u -> u.AbsoluteUri)
    73→            |> Set.ofList
    74→
    75→        // Find all NodeShapes
    76→        let nodeShapes =
    77→            triplesWithPredicate shapes rdfTypeNode
    78→            |> Seq.filter (fun t ->
    79→                match t.Object with
    80→                | :? IUriNode as on -> uriEquals on.Uri nodeShapeUri
    81→                | _ -> false)
    82→            |> Seq.choose (fun t ->
    83→                match t.Subject with
    84→                | :? IUriNode as sn -> Some sn
    85→                | _ -> None)
    86→            |> Seq.toList
    87→
    88→        nodeShapes
    89→        |> List.collect (fun shapeNode ->
    90→            triplesWithSubjectPredicate shapes (shapeNode :> INode) targetClassNode
    91→            |> Seq.choose (fun t ->
    92→                match t.Object with
    93→                | :? IUriNode as targetUri ->
    94→                    if ontologyClasses.Contains targetUri.Uri.AbsoluteUri then
    95→                        None
    96→                    else
    97→                        Some
    98→                            { Severity = "error"
    99→                              Message = $"SHACL NodeShape '%s{shapeNode.Uri.AbsoluteUri}' targets class '%s{targetUri.Uri.AbsoluteUri}' which does not exist in the ontology"
   100→                              Uri = Some shapeNode.Uri }
   101→                | _ -> None)
   102→            |> Seq.toList)
   103→
   104→    let private checkUnmappedTypes (unmappedTypes: UnmappedType list) : ValidationIssue list =
   105→        unmappedTypes
   106→        |> List.map (fun ut ->
   107→            { Severity = "warning"
   108→              Message = $"Type '%s{ut.TypeName}' was not mapped: %s{ut.Reason} (at %s{ut.Location.File}:%d{ut.Location.Line})"
   109→              Uri = None })
   110→
   111→    let private computeFileHash (filePath: string) : string =
   112→        use sha256 = SHA256.Create()
   113→        use stream = File.OpenRead(filePath)
   114→        let hash = sha256.ComputeHash(stream)
   115→        BitConverter.ToString(hash).Replace("-", "").ToLowerInvariant()
   116→
   117→    let private checkStaleness (state: ExtractionState) : ValidationIssue list =
   118→        // Collect unique source files from the SourceMap
   119→        let sourceFiles =
   120→            state.SourceMap.Values
   121→            |> Seq.map (fun loc -> loc.File)
   122→            |> Seq.distinct
   123→            |> Seq.toList
   124→
   125→        if sourceFiles.IsEmpty then
   126→            []
   127→        else
   128→            // Compute current combined hash and compare to stored SourceHash
   129→            let currentHashes =
   130→                sourceFiles
   131→                |> List.choose (fun f ->
   132→                    if File.Exists f then Some (computeFileHash f)
   133→                    else None)
   134→                |> String.concat ""
   135→
   136→            let currentCombinedHash =
   137→                if currentHashes.Length > 0 then
   138→                    use sha256 = SHA256.Create()
   139→                    let bytes = System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(currentHashes)
   140→                    BitConverter.ToString(sha256.ComputeHash(bytes)).Replace("-", "").ToLowerInvariant()
   141→                else
   142→                    ""
   143→
   144→            if currentCombinedHash <> state.Metadata.SourceHash && state.Metadata.SourceHash <> "" then
   145→                [ { Severity = "warning"
   146→                    Message = "Source files have changed since last extraction. Run 'frank-cli extract' to update."
   147→                    Uri = None } ]
   148→            else
   149→                []
   150→
   151→    let execute (projectPath: string) : Result<ValidateResult, string> =
   152→        let statePath = ExtractionState.defaultStatePath (Path.GetDirectoryName projectPath)
   153→
   154→        match ExtractionState.load statePath with
   155→        | Error e -> Error $"Failed to load state: {e}"
   156→        | Ok state ->
   157→
   158→        let owlClasses = findOwlClasses state.Ontology
   159→        let propertyIssues = checkClassesHaveProperties state.Ontology owlClasses
   160→        let shapeIssues = checkShapeTargetClasses state.Ontology state.Shapes
   161→        let unmappedIssues = checkUnmappedTypes state.UnmappedTypes
   162→        let stalenessIssues = checkStaleness state
   163→
   164→        let allIssues = propertyIssues @ shapeIssues @ unmappedIssues @ stalenessIssues
   165→
   166→        let mappedClassCount = owlClasses.Length |> float
   167→        let totalAnalyzedTypeCount = (owlClasses.Length + state.UnmappedTypes.Length) |> float
   168→
   169→        let coveragePercent =
   170→            if totalAnalyzedTypeCount > 0.0 then
   171→                (mappedClassCount / totalAnalyzedTypeCount) * 100.0
   172→            else
   173→                100.0
   174→
   175→        let isValid =
   176→            allIssues
   177→            |> List.exists (fun i -> i.Severity = "error")
   178→            |> not
   179→
   180→        Ok
   181→            { Issues = allIssues
   182→              CoveragePercent = coveragePercent
   183→              IsValid = isValid }
   184→

1→namespace Frank.Cli.Core.Output
     2→
     3→open System.IO
     4→open System.Text
     5→open System.Text.Json
     6→open Frank.Cli.Core.Commands
     7→open Frank.Cli.Core.State
     8→
     9→module JsonOutput =
    10→
    11→    let private serializerOptions =
    12→        JsonSerializerOptions(
    13→            PropertyNamingPolicy = JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCase,
    14→            WriteIndented = true)
    15→
    16→    let private writeString (w: Utf8JsonWriter) (name: string) (value: string) =
    17→        w.WriteString(name, value)
    18→
    19→    let private writeNumber (w: Utf8JsonWriter) (name: string) (value: int) =
    20→        w.WriteNumber(name, value)
    21→
    22→    let formatExtractResult (result: ExtractCommand.ExtractResult) : string =
    23→        use stream = new MemoryStream()
    24→        use writer = new Utf8JsonWriter(stream, JsonWriterOptions(Indented = true))
    25→
    26→        writer.WriteStartObject()
    27→        writeString writer "status" "ok"
    28→
    29→        writer.WriteStartObject("ontologySummary")
    30→        writeNumber writer "classCount" result.OntologySummary.ClassCount
    31→        writeNumber writer "propertyCount" result.OntologySummary.PropertyCount
    32→        writeNumber writer "alignedCount" result.OntologySummary.AlignedCount
    33→        writeNumber writer "unalignedCount" result.OntologySummary.UnalignedCount
    34→        writer.WriteEndObject()
    35→
    36→        writer.WriteStartObject("shapesSummary")
    37→        writeNumber writer "shapeCount" result.ShapesSummary.ShapeCount
    38→        writeNumber writer "constraintCount" result.ShapesSummary.ConstraintCount
    39→        writer.WriteEndObject()
    40→
    41→        writer.WriteStartArray("unmappedTypes")
    42→        for ut in result.UnmappedTypes do
    43→            writer.WriteStartObject()
    44→            writeString writer "typeName" ut.TypeName
    45→            writeString writer "reason" ut.Reason
    46→            writeString writer "file" ut.Location.File
    47→            writeNumber writer "line" ut.Location.Line
    48→            writer.WriteEndObject()
    49→        writer.WriteEndArray()
    50→
    51→        writeString writer "stateFilePath" result.StateFilePath
    52→
    53→        writer.WriteEndObject()
    54→        writer.Flush()
    55→
    56→        Encoding.UTF8.GetString(stream.ToArray())
    57→
    58→    let formatClarifyResult (result: ClarifyCommand.ClarifyResult) : string =
    59→        use stream = new MemoryStream()
    60→        use writer = new Utf8JsonWriter(stream, JsonWriterOptions(Indented = true))
    61→
    62→        writer.WriteStartObject()
    63→        writeString writer "status" "ok"
    64→
    65→        writer.WriteStartArray("questions")
    66→        for q in result.Questions do
    67→            writer.WriteStartObject()
    68→            writeString writer "id" q.Id
    69→            writeString writer "category" q.Category
    70→            writeString writer "questionText" q.QuestionText
    71→
    72→            writer.WriteStartObject("context")
    73→            writeString writer "sourceType" q.Context.SourceType
    74→            match q.Context.Location with
    75→            | Some loc -> writeString writer "location" loc
    76→            | None -> writer.WriteNull("location")
    77→            writer.WriteEndObject()
    78→
    79→            writer.WriteStartArray("options")
    80→            for opt in q.Options do
    81→                writer.WriteStartObject()
    82→                writeString writer "label" opt.Label
    83→                writeString writer "impact" opt.Impact
    84→                writer.WriteEndObject()
    85→            writer.WriteEndArray()
    86→
    87→            writer.WriteEndObject()
    88→        writer.WriteEndArray()
    89→
    90→        writeNumber writer "resolvedCount" result.ResolvedCount
    91→        writeNumber writer "totalCount" result.TotalCount
    92→
    93→        writer.WriteEndObject()
    94→        writer.Flush()
    95→
    96→        Encoding.UTF8.GetString(stream.ToArray())
    97→
    98→    let formatValidateResult (result: ValidateCommand.ValidateResult) : string =
    99→        use stream = new MemoryStream()
   100→        use writer = new Utf8JsonWriter(stream, JsonWriterOptions(Indented = true))
   101→
   102→        writer.WriteStartObject()
   103→        writeString writer "status" (if result.IsValid then "ok" else "invalid")
   104→        writer.WriteBoolean("isValid", result.IsValid)
   105→        writer.WriteNumber("coveragePercent", result.CoveragePercent)
   106→
   107→        writer.WriteStartArray("issues")
   108→        for issue in result.Issues do
   109→            writer.WriteStartObject()
   110→            writeString writer "severity" issue.Severity
   111→            writeString writer "message" issue.Message
   112→            match issue.Uri with
   113→            | Some uri -> writeString writer "uri" uri.AbsoluteUri
   114→            | None -> writer.WriteNull("uri")
   115→            writer.WriteEndObject()
   116→        writer.WriteEndArray()
   117→
   118→        writer.WriteEndObject()
   119→        writer.Flush()
   120→
   121→        Encoding.UTF8.GetString(stream.ToArray())
   122→
   123→    let formatDiffResult (result: DiffCommand.DiffCommandResult) : string =
   124→        use stream = new MemoryStream()
   125→        use writer = new Utf8JsonWriter(stream, JsonWriterOptions(Indented = true))
   126→
   127→        writer.WriteStartObject()
   128→        writeString writer "status" "ok"
   129→
   130→        writer.WriteStartArray("added")
   131→        for entry in result.Diff.Added do
   132→            writer.WriteStartObject()
   133→            writeString writer "uri" entry.Uri.AbsoluteUri
   134→            match entry.Field with
   135→            | Some f -> writeString writer "field" f
   136→            | None -> writer.WriteNull("field")
   137→            match entry.To with
   138→            | Some v -> writeString writer "value" v
   139→            | None -> writer.WriteNull("value")
   140→            writer.WriteEndObject()
   141→        writer.WriteEndArray()
   142→
   143→        writer.WriteStartArray("removed")
   144→        for entry in result.Diff.Removed do
   145→            writer.WriteStartObject()
   146→            writeString writer "uri" entry.Uri.AbsoluteUri
   147→            match entry.Field with
   148→            | Some f -> writeString writer "field" f
   149→            | None -> writer.WriteNull("field")
   150→            match entry.From with
   151→            | Some v -> writeString writer "value" v
   152→            | None -> writer.WriteNull("value")
   153→            writer.WriteEndObject()
   154→        writer.WriteEndArray()
   155→
   156→        writer.WriteStartArray("modified")
   157→        for entry in result.Diff.Modified do
   158→            writer.WriteStartObject()
   159→            writeString writer "uri" entry.Uri.AbsoluteUri
   160→            match entry.Field with
   161→            | Some f -> writeString writer "field" f
   162→            | None -> writer.WriteNull("field")
   163→            match entry.From with
   164→            | Some v -> writeString writer "from" v
   165→            | None -> writer.WriteNull("from")
   166→            match entry.To with
   167→            | Some v -> writeString writer "to" v
   168→            | None -> writer.WriteNull("to")
   169→            writer.WriteEndObject()
   170→        writer.WriteEndArray()
   171→
   172→        writeNumber writer "addedCount" result.Diff.Added.Length
   173→        writeNumber writer "removedCount" result.Diff.Removed.Length
   174→        writeNumber writer "modifiedCount" result.Diff.Modified.Length
   175→
   176→        writer.WriteEndObject()
   177→        writer.Flush()
   178→
   179→        Encoding.UTF8.GetString(stream.ToArray())
   180→
   181→    let formatCompileResult (result: CompileCommand.CompileResult) : string =
   182→        use stream = new MemoryStream()
   183→        use writer = new Utf8JsonWriter(stream, JsonWriterOptions(Indented = true))
   184→
   185→        writer.WriteStartObject()
   186→        writeString writer "status" "ok"
   187→        writeString writer "ontologyPath" result.OntologyPath
   188→        writeString writer "shapesPath" result.ShapesPath
   189→        writeString writer "manifestPath" result.ManifestPath
   190→
   191→        writer.WriteStartArray("embeddedResourceNames")
   192→        for name in result.EmbeddedResourceNames do
   193→            writer.WriteStringValue name
   194→        writer.WriteEndArray()
   195→
   196→        writer.WriteEndObject()
   197→        writer.Flush()
   198→
   199→        Encoding.UTF8.GetString(stream.ToArray())
   200→
   201→    let formatError (message: string) : string =
   202→        let error = {| status = "error"; message = message |}
   203→        JsonSerializer.Serialize(error, serializerOptions)
   204→

1→namespace Frank.Cli.Core.Output
     2→
     3→open System
     4→open Frank.Cli.Core.Commands
     5→
     6→module TextOutput =
     7→
     8→    let private isColorEnabled () =
     9→        let noColor = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("NO_COLOR")
    10→        isNull noColor && Console.IsOutputRedirected |> not
    11→
    12→    let private bold text =
    13→        if isColorEnabled () then $"\033[1m{text}\033[0m" else text
    14→
    15→    let private yellow text =
    16→        if isColorEnabled () then $"\033[33m{text}\033[0m" else text
    17→
    18→    let private red text =
    19→        if isColorEnabled () then $"\033[31m{text}\033[0m" else text
    20→
    21→    let private green text =
    22→        if isColorEnabled () then $"\033[32m{text}\033[0m" else text
    23→
    24→    let formatExtractResult (result: ExtractCommand.ExtractResult) : string =
    25→        let sb = System.Text.StringBuilder()
    26→        sb.AppendLine(bold "Extraction Summary") |> ignore
    27→        sb.AppendLine() |> ignore
    28→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "%-18s| Count" "Category") |> ignore
    29→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "------------------+------") |> ignore
    30→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "%-18s| %5d" "Classes" result.OntologySummary.ClassCount) |> ignore
    31→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "%-18s| %5d" "Properties" result.OntologySummary.PropertyCount) |> ignore
    32→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "%-18s| %5d" "Aligned" result.OntologySummary.AlignedCount) |> ignore
    33→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "%-18s| %5d" "Unaligned" result.OntologySummary.UnalignedCount) |> ignore
    34→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "%-18s| %5d" "Shapes" result.ShapesSummary.ShapeCount) |> ignore
    35→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "%-18s| %5d" "Constraints" result.ShapesSummary.ConstraintCount) |> ignore
    36→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "%-18s| %5d" "Unmapped Types" (result.UnmappedTypes |> List.length)) |> ignore
    37→        sb.AppendLine() |> ignore
    38→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "State saved to: %s" result.StateFilePath) |> ignore
    39→
    40→        if not result.UnmappedTypes.IsEmpty then
    41→            sb.AppendLine() |> ignore
    42→            sb.AppendLine(yellow (sprintf "Unmapped types (%d):" result.UnmappedTypes.Length)) |> ignore
    43→            for ut in result.UnmappedTypes do
    44→                sb.AppendLine(sprintf "  - %s (%s) at %s:%d" ut.TypeName ut.Reason ut.Location.File ut.Location.Line) |> ignore
    45→
    46→        sb.ToString()
    47→
    48→    let formatClarifyResult (result: ClarifyCommand.ClarifyResult) : string =
    49→        let sb = System.Text.StringBuilder()
    50→        sb.AppendLine(bold "Clarification Questions") |> ignore
    51→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "Resolved: %d / %d" result.ResolvedCount result.TotalCount) |> ignore
    52→        sb.AppendLine(String.replicate 40 "-") |> ignore
    53→
    54→        result.Questions
    55→        |> List.iteri (fun i q ->
    56→            sb.AppendLine() |> ignore
    57→            sb.AppendLine(bold (sprintf "%d. [%s] %s" (i + 1) q.Category q.QuestionText)) |> ignore
    58→            let locStr = q.Context.Location |> Option.defaultValue "unknown"
    59→            sb.AppendLine(sprintf "   Context: %s at %s" q.Context.SourceType locStr) |> ignore
    60→            q.Options
    61→            |> List.iteri (fun j opt ->
    62→                let letter = char (int 'a' + j)
    63→                sb.AppendLine(sprintf "   %c) %s — %s" letter opt.Label opt.Impact) |> ignore))
    64→
    65→        sb.ToString()
    66→
    67→    let formatValidateResult (result: ValidateCommand.ValidateResult) : string =
    68→        let sb = System.Text.StringBuilder()
    69→
    70→        let statusText =
    71→            if result.IsValid then green "VALID" else red "INVALID"
    72→
    73→        sb.AppendLine(bold (sprintf "Validation: %s" statusText)) |> ignore
    74→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "Coverage: %.1f%%" result.CoveragePercent) |> ignore
    75→        sb.AppendLine() |> ignore
    76→
    77→        if result.Issues.IsEmpty then
    78→            sb.AppendLine("No issues found.") |> ignore
    79→        else
    80→            sb.AppendLine(sprintf "Issues (%d):" result.Issues.Length) |> ignore
    81→
    82→            for issue in result.Issues do
    83→                let prefix =
    84→                    match issue.Severity with
    85→                    | "error" -> red "ERROR"
    86→                    | "warning" -> yellow "WARN"
    87→                    | _ -> issue.Severity.ToUpperInvariant()
    88→
    89→                let uriStr =
    90→                    issue.Uri
    91→                    |> Option.map (fun u -> sprintf " (%s)" u.AbsoluteUri)
    92→                    |> Option.defaultValue ""
    93→
    94→                sb.AppendLine(sprintf "  [%s] %s%s" prefix issue.Message uriStr) |> ignore
    95→
    96→        sb.ToString()
    97→
    98→    let formatDiffResult (result: DiffCommand.DiffCommandResult) : string =
    99→        let sb = System.Text.StringBuilder()
   100→        sb.AppendLine(bold "Diff Summary") |> ignore
   101→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "Added: %d  Removed: %d  Modified: %d"
   102→            result.Diff.Added.Length
   103→            result.Diff.Removed.Length
   104→            result.Diff.Modified.Length) |> ignore
   105→        sb.AppendLine() |> ignore
   106→        sb.AppendLine(result.FormattedDiff) |> ignore
   107→        sb.ToString()
   108→
   109→    let formatCompileResult (result: CompileCommand.CompileResult) : string =
   110→        let sb = System.Text.StringBuilder()
   111→        sb.AppendLine(bold "Compile Complete") |> ignore
   112→        sb.AppendLine() |> ignore
   113→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "Ontology: %s" result.OntologyPath) |> ignore
   114→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "Shapes:   %s" result.ShapesPath) |> ignore
   115→        sb.AppendLine(sprintf "Manifest: %s" result.ManifestPath) |> ignore
   116→        sb.AppendLine() |> ignore
   117→        sb.AppendLine("Embed these resources in your project:") |> ignore
   118→        for name in result.EmbeddedResourceNames do
   119→            sb.AppendLine(sprintf "  <EmbeddedResource Include=\"...\" LogicalName=\"%s\" />" name) |> ignore
   120→        sb.ToString()
   121→
   122→    let formatError (message: string) : string =
   123→        red (sprintf "Error: %s" message)
   124→

1→namespace Frank.Cli.Core.State
     2→
     3→open System
     4→open System.Text
     5→open VDS.RDF
     6→
     7→type DiffEntry =
     8→    { Type: string
     9→      Uri: Uri
    10→      Label: string option
    11→      Field: string option
    12→      From: string option
    13→      To: string option }
    14→
    15→type DiffResult =
    16→    { Added: DiffEntry list
    17→      Removed: DiffEntry list
    18→      Modified: DiffEntry list }
    19→
    20→module DiffEngine =
    21→
    22→    let private tripleKey (t: Triple) =
    23→        (t.Subject.ToString(), t.Predicate.ToString())
    24→
    25→    let private tripleToString (t: Triple) = t.Object.ToString()
    26→
    27→    let private nodeUri (node: INode) : Uri =
    28→        match node with
    29→        | :? IUriNode as u -> u.Uri
    30→        | _ -> Uri("urn:blank:" + node.ToString())
    31→
    32→    let private entryFromTriple (diffType: string) (t: Triple) : DiffEntry =
    33→        { Type = diffType
    34→          Uri = nodeUri t.Subject
    35→          Label = None
    36→          Field = Some(t.Predicate.ToString())
    37→          From = None
    38→          To = Some(t.Object.ToString()) }
    39→
    40→    let diffGraphs (oldGraph: IGraph) (newGraph: IGraph) : DiffResult =
    41→        let oldTriples = oldGraph.Triples |> Seq.toList
    42→        let newTriples = newGraph.Triples |> Seq.toList
    43→
    44→        let oldSet =
    45→            oldTriples
    46→            |> List.map (fun t -> (t.Subject.ToString(), t.Predicate.ToString(), t.Object.ToString()))
    47→            |> Set.ofList
    48→
    49→        let newSet =
    50→            newTriples
    51→            |> List.map (fun t -> (t.Subject.ToString(), t.Predicate.ToString(), t.Object.ToString()))
    52→            |> Set.ofList
    53→
    54→        // Triples in new but not in old
    55→        let addedTripleKeys = Set.difference newSet oldSet
    56→
    57→        // Triples in old but not in new
    58→        let removedTripleKeys = Set.difference oldSet newSet
    59→
    60→        // Group by (subject, predicate) to detect modifications
    61→        let addedByKey =
    62→            addedTripleKeys
    63→            |> Set.toList
    64→            |> List.groupBy (fun (s, p, _) -> (s, p))
    65→            |> Map.ofList
    66→
    67→        let removedByKey =
    68→            removedTripleKeys
    69→            |> Set.toList
    70→            |> List.groupBy (fun (s, p, _) -> (s, p))
    71→            |> Map.ofList
    72→
    73→        let allKeys =
    74→            Set.union (addedByKey |> Map.keys |> Set.ofSeq) (removedByKey |> Map.keys |> Set.ofSeq)
    75→
    76→        let mutable added = []
    77→        let mutable removed = []
    78→        let mutable modified = []
    79→
    80→        for key in allKeys do
    81→            let (s, p) = key
    82→            let hasAdded = Map.containsKey key addedByKey
    83→            let hasRemoved = Map.containsKey key removedByKey
    84→
    85→            let subjectUri =
    86→                try
    87→                    Uri(s)
    88→                with _ ->
    89→                    Uri("urn:blank:" + s)
    90→
    91→            if hasAdded && hasRemoved then
    92→                // Modified: same subject+predicate but different object
    93→                let removedObjs = removedByKey.[key] |> List.map (fun (_, _, o) -> o)
    94→                let addedObjs = addedByKey.[key] |> List.map (fun (_, _, o) -> o)
    95→
    96→                modified <-
    97→                    { Type = "Modified"
    98→                      Uri = subjectUri
    99→                      Label = None
   100→                      Field = Some p
   101→                      From = Some(String.concat ", " removedObjs)
   102→                      To = Some(String.concat ", " addedObjs) }
   103→                    :: modified
   104→            elif hasAdded then
   105→                let objs = addedByKey.[key]
   106→
   107→                for (_, _, o) in objs do
   108→                    added <-
   109→                        { Type = "Added"
   110→                          Uri = subjectUri
   111→                          Label = None
   112→                          Field = Some p
   113→                          From = None
   114→                          To = Some o }
   115→                        :: added
   116→            else
   117→                let objs = removedByKey.[key]
   118→
   119→                for (_, _, o) in objs do
   120→                    removed <-
   121→                        { Type = "Removed"
   122→                          Uri = subjectUri
   123→                          Label = None
   124→                          Field = Some p
   125→                          From = Some o
   126→                          To = None }
   127→                        :: removed
   128→
   129→        { Added = List.rev added
   130→          Removed = List.rev removed
   131→          Modified = List.rev modified }
   132→
   133→    let diffStates (oldState: ExtractionState) (newState: ExtractionState) : DiffResult =
   134→        let ontoDiff = diffGraphs oldState.Ontology newState.Ontology
   135→        let shapesDiff = diffGraphs oldState.Shapes newState.Shapes
   136→
   137→        { Added = ontoDiff.Added @ shapesDiff.Added
   138→          Removed = ontoDiff.Removed @ shapesDiff.Removed
   139→          Modified = ontoDiff.Modified @ shapesDiff.Modified }
   140→
   141→    let formatDiff (diff: DiffResult) : string =
   142→        let sb = StringBuilder()
   143→
   144→        if not (List.isEmpty diff.Added) then
   145→            sb.AppendLine("Added:") |> ignore
   146→
   147→            for entry in diff.Added do
   148→                let field = entry.Field |> Option.defaultValue ""
   149→                let toVal = entry.To |> Option.defaultValue ""
   150→                sb.AppendLine($"  + {entry.Uri} [{field}] = {toVal}")
   151→                |> ignore
   152→
   153→        if not (List.isEmpty diff.Removed) then
   154→            sb.AppendLine("Removed:") |> ignore
   155→
   156→            for entry in diff.Removed do
   157→                let field = entry.Field |> Option.defaultValue ""
   158→                let fromVal = entry.From |> Option.defaultValue ""
   159→                sb.AppendLine($"  - {entry.Uri} [{field}] = {fromVal}")
   160→                |> ignore
   161→
   162→        if not (List.isEmpty diff.Modified) then
   163→            sb.AppendLine("Modified:") |> ignore
   164→
   165→            for entry in diff.Modified do
   166→                let field = entry.Field |> Option.defaultValue ""
   167→                let fromVal = entry.From |> Option.defaultValue ""
   168→                let toVal = entry.To |> Option.defaultValue ""
   169→                sb.AppendLine($"  ~ {entry.Uri} [{field}]: {fromVal} -> {toVal}")
   170→                |> ignore
   171→
   172→        if List.isEmpty diff.Added && List.isEmpty diff.Removed && List.isEmpty diff.Modified then
   173→            sb.AppendLine("No changes detected.") |> ignore
   174→
   175→        sb.ToString().TrimEnd()
   176→

1→namespace Frank.Cli.Core.State
     2→
     3→open System
     4→open System.Collections.Generic
     5→open System.IO
     6→open System.Text.Json
     7→open VDS.RDF
     8→open VDS.RDF.Parsing
     9→open VDS.RDF.Writing
    10→
    11→type SourceLocation =
    12→    { File: string
    13→      Line: int
    14→      Column: int }
    15→
    16→type ExtractionMetadata =
    17→    { Timestamp: DateTimeOffset
    18→      SourceHash: string
    19→      ToolVersion: string
    20→      BaseUri: Uri
    21→      Vocabularies: string list }
    22→
    23→type UnmappedType =
    24→    { TypeName: string
    25→      Reason: string
    26→      Location: SourceLocation }
    27→
    28→type ExtractionState =
    29→    { Ontology: IGraph
    30→      Shapes: IGraph
    31→      SourceMap: Dictionary<Uri, SourceLocation>
    32→      Clarifications: Map<string, string>
    33→      Metadata: ExtractionMetadata
    34→      UnmappedTypes: UnmappedType list }
    35→
    36→module ExtractionState =
    37→
    38→    let graphToTurtle (graph: IGraph) : string =
    39→        let sw = new System.IO.StringWriter()
    40→        let writer = CompressingTurtleWriter()
    41→        writer.Save(graph, sw :> System.IO.TextWriter)
    42→        sw.ToString()
    43→
    44→    let turtleToGraph (turtle: string) : IGraph =
    45→        let g = new Graph()
    46→        let parser = TurtleParser()
    47→        let sr = new System.IO.StringReader(turtle)
    48→        parser.Load(g, sr :> System.IO.TextReader)
    49→        g :> IGraph
    50→
    51→    let private writeSourceLocation (writer: Utf8JsonWriter) (loc: SourceLocation) =
    52→        writer.WriteStartObject()
    53→        writer.WriteString("file", loc.File)
    54→        writer.WriteNumber("line", loc.Line)
    55→        writer.WriteNumber("column", loc.Column)
    56→        writer.WriteEndObject()
    57→
    58→    let private readSourceLocation (elem: JsonElement) : SourceLocation =
    59→        { File = elem.GetProperty("file").GetString()
    60→          Line = elem.GetProperty("line").GetInt32()
    61→          Column = elem.GetProperty("column").GetInt32() }
    62→
    63→    let save (path: string) (state: ExtractionState) : Result<unit, string> =
    64→        try
    65→            let dir = Path.GetDirectoryName(path)
    66→
    67→            if not (Directory.Exists(dir)) then
    68→                Directory.CreateDirectory(dir) |> ignore
    69→
    70→            use stream = File.Create(path)
    71→
    72→            use writer =
    73→                new Utf8JsonWriter(stream, JsonWriterOptions(Indented = true))
    74→
    75→            writer.WriteStartObject()
    76→
    77→            // Graphs as Turtle strings
    78→            writer.WriteString("ontology", graphToTurtle state.Ontology)
    79→            writer.WriteString("shapes", graphToTurtle state.Shapes)
    80→
    81→            // SourceMap
    82→            writer.WriteStartObject("sourceMap")
    83→
    84→            for kvp in state.SourceMap do
    85→                writer.WritePropertyName(kvp.Key.AbsoluteUri)
    86→                writeSourceLocation writer kvp.Value
    87→
    88→            writer.WriteEndObject()
    89→
    90→            // Clarifications
    91→            writer.WriteStartObject("clarifications")
    92→
    93→            for kvp in state.Clarifications do
    94→                writer.WriteString(kvp.Key, kvp.Value)
    95→
    96→            writer.WriteEndObject()
    97→
    98→            // Metadata
    99→            writer.WriteStartObject("metadata")
   100→            writer.WriteString("timestamp", state.Metadata.Timestamp)
   101→            writer.WriteString("sourceHash", state.Metadata.SourceHash)
   102→            writer.WriteString("toolVersion", state.Metadata.ToolVersion)
   103→            writer.WriteString("baseUri", state.Metadata.BaseUri.AbsoluteUri)
   104→            writer.WriteStartArray("vocabularies")
   105→
   106→            for v in state.Metadata.Vocabularies do
   107→                writer.WriteStringValue(v)
   108→
   109→            writer.WriteEndArray()
   110→            writer.WriteEndObject()
   111→
   112→            // UnmappedTypes
   113→            writer.WriteStartArray("unmappedTypes")
   114→
   115→            for ut in state.UnmappedTypes do
   116→                writer.WriteStartObject()
   117→                writer.WriteString("typeName", ut.TypeName)
   118→                writer.WriteString("reason", ut.Reason)
   119→                writer.WritePropertyName("location")
   120→                writeSourceLocation writer ut.Location
   121→                writer.WriteEndObject()
   122→
   123→            writer.WriteEndArray()
   124→
   125→            writer.WriteEndObject()
   126→            writer.Flush()
   127→            Ok()
   128→        with ex ->
   129→            Error ex.Message
   130→
   131→    let load (path: string) : Result<ExtractionState, string> =
   132→        try
   133→            if not (File.Exists(path)) then
   134→                Error $"File not found: {path}"
   135→            else
   136→                let json = File.ReadAllText(path)
   137→                let doc = JsonDocument.Parse(json)
   138→                let root = doc.RootElement
   139→
   140→                let ontology = turtleToGraph (root.GetProperty("ontology").GetString())
   141→                let shapes = turtleToGraph (root.GetProperty("shapes").GetString())
   142→
   143→                let sourceMap =
   144→                    let sm = root.GetProperty("sourceMap")
   145→                    let dict = Dictionary<Uri, SourceLocation>()
   146→
   147→                    for prop in sm.EnumerateObject() do
   148→                        let loc = readSourceLocation prop.Value
   149→                        dict.[Uri(prop.Name)] <- loc
   150→
   151→                    dict
   152→
   153→                let clarifications =
   154→                    let cl = root.GetProperty("clarifications")
   155→                    let mutable map = Map.empty
   156→
   157→                    for prop in cl.EnumerateObject() do
   158→                        map <- Map.add prop.Name (prop.Value.GetString()) map
   159→
   160→                    map
   161→
   162→                let metaElem = root.GetProperty("metadata")
   163→
   164→                let metadata =
   165→                    { Timestamp = metaElem.GetProperty("timestamp").GetDateTimeOffset()
   166→                      SourceHash = metaElem.GetProperty("sourceHash").GetString()
   167→                      ToolVersion = metaElem.GetProperty("toolVersion").GetString()
   168→                      BaseUri = Uri(metaElem.GetProperty("baseUri").GetString())
   169→                      Vocabularies =
   170→                        [ for v in metaElem.GetProperty("vocabularies").EnumerateArray() do
   171→                              v.GetString() ] }
   172→
   173→                let unmappedTypes =
   174→                    [ for ut in root.GetProperty("unmappedTypes").EnumerateArray() do
   175→                          { TypeName = ut.GetProperty("typeName").GetString()
   176→                            Reason = ut.GetProperty("reason").GetString()
   177→                            Location = readSourceLocation (ut.GetProperty("location")) } ]
   178→
   179→                Ok
   180→                    { Ontology = ontology
   181→                      Shapes = shapes
   182→                      SourceMap = sourceMap
   183→                      Clarifications = clarifications
   184→                      Metadata = metadata
   185→                      UnmappedTypes = unmappedTypes }
   186→        with ex ->
   187→            Error ex.Message
   188→
   189→    let defaultStatePath (projectDir: string) : string =
   190→        Path.Combine(projectDir, "obj", "frank-cli", "state.json")
   191→

1→module Program
     2→
     3→open System
     4→open System.CommandLine
     5→open Frank.Cli.Core.Commands
     6→open Frank.Cli.Core.Output
     7→
     8→[<EntryPoint>]
     9→let main args =
    10→    let root =
    11→        RootCommand("frank-cli: Semantic resource extraction for Frank applications")
    12→
    13→    // ── extract ──
    14→    let extractCmd = Command("extract")
    15→    extractCmd.Description <- "Extract semantic definitions from F# source"
    16→    let extractProjectOpt = Option<string>("--project")
    17→    extractProjectOpt.Description <- "Path to .fsproj file"
    18→    extractProjectOpt.Required <- true
    19→    let baseUriOpt = Option<string>("--base-uri")
    20→    baseUriOpt.Description <- "Base URI for the ontology"
    21→    baseUriOpt.Required <- true
    22→    let vocabOpt = Option<string array>("--vocabularies")
    23→    vocabOpt.Description <- "Vocabulary namespaces to align"
    24→    vocabOpt.DefaultValueFactory <- (fun _ -> [| "schema.org" |])
    25→    let scopeOpt = Option<string>("--scope")
    26→    scopeOpt.Description <- "Extraction scope"
    27→    scopeOpt.DefaultValueFactory <- (fun _ -> "full")
    28→    let extractFormatOpt = Option<string>("--format")
    29→    extractFormatOpt.Description <- "Output format (text|json)"
    30→    extractFormatOpt.DefaultValueFactory <- (fun _ -> "text")
    31→    extractCmd.Options.Add(extractProjectOpt)
    32→    extractCmd.Options.Add(baseUriOpt)
    33→    extractCmd.Options.Add(vocabOpt)
    34→    extractCmd.Options.Add(scopeOpt)
    35→    extractCmd.Options.Add(extractFormatOpt)
    36→
    37→    extractCmd.SetAction(fun parseResult ->
    38→        let project = parseResult.GetValue(extractProjectOpt)
    39→        let baseUri = parseResult.GetValue(baseUriOpt)
    40→        let vocabs = parseResult.GetValue(vocabOpt)
    41→        let scope = parseResult.GetValue(scopeOpt)
    42→        let format = parseResult.GetValue(extractFormatOpt)
    43→
    44→        let result =
    45→            ExtractCommand.execute project (Uri baseUri) (Array.toList vocabs) scope
    46→            |> Async.RunSynchronously
    47→
    48→        match result with
    49→        | Ok r ->
    50→            let output =
    51→                if format = "json" then
    52→                    JsonOutput.formatExtractResult r
    53→                else
    54→                    TextOutput.formatExtractResult r
    55→
    56→            Console.WriteLine(output)
    57→        | Error e ->
    58→            let output =
    59→                if format = "json" then
    60→                    JsonOutput.formatError e
    61→                else
    62→                    TextOutput.formatError e
    63→
    64→            Console.Error.WriteLine(output))
    65→
    66→    root.Subcommands.Add(extractCmd)
    67→
    68→    // ── clarify ──
    69→    let clarifyCmd = Command("clarify")
    70→    clarifyCmd.Description <- "Identify ambiguities requiring human input"
    71→    let clarifyProjectOpt = Option<string>("--project")
    72→    clarifyProjectOpt.Description <- "Path to .fsproj file"
    73→    clarifyProjectOpt.Required <- true
    74→    let clarifyFormatOpt = Option<string>("--format")
    75→    clarifyFormatOpt.Description <- "Output format (text|json)"
    76→    clarifyFormatOpt.DefaultValueFactory <- (fun _ -> "text")
    77→    clarifyCmd.Options.Add(clarifyProjectOpt)
    78→    clarifyCmd.Options.Add(clarifyFormatOpt)
    79→
    80→    clarifyCmd.SetAction(fun parseResult ->
    81→        let project = parseResult.GetValue(clarifyProjectOpt)
    82→        let format = parseResult.GetValue(clarifyFormatOpt)
    83→
    84→        let result = ClarifyCommand.execute project
    85→
    86→        match result with
    87→        | Ok r ->
    88→            let output =
    89→                if format = "json" then
    90→                    JsonOutput.formatClarifyResult r
    91→                else
    92→                    TextOutput.formatClarifyResult r
    93→
    94→            Console.WriteLine(output)
    95→        | Error e ->
    96→            let output =
    97→                if format = "json" then
    98→                    JsonOutput.formatError e
    99→                else
   100→                    TextOutput.formatError e
   101→
   102→            Console.Error.WriteLine(output))
   103→
   104→    root.Subcommands.Add(clarifyCmd)
   105→
   106→    // ── validate ──
   107→    let validateCmd = Command("validate")
   108→    validateCmd.Description <- "Validate completeness and consistency of extracted definitions"
   109→    let validateProjectOpt = Option<string>("--project")
   110→    validateProjectOpt.Description <- "Path to .fsproj file"
   111→    validateProjectOpt.Required <- true
   112→    let validateFormatOpt = Option<string>("--format")
   113→    validateFormatOpt.Description <- "Output format (text|json)"
   114→    validateFormatOpt.DefaultValueFactory <- (fun _ -> "text")
   115→    validateCmd.Options.Add(validateProjectOpt)
   116→    validateCmd.Options.Add(validateFormatOpt)
   117→
   118→    validateCmd.SetAction(fun parseResult ->
   119→        let project = parseResult.GetValue(validateProjectOpt)
   120→        let format = parseResult.GetValue(validateFormatOpt)
   121→
   122→        let result = ValidateCommand.execute project
   123→
   124→        match result with
   125→        | Ok r ->
   126→            let output =
   127→                if format = "json" then
   128→                    JsonOutput.formatValidateResult r
   129→                else
   130→                    TextOutput.formatValidateResult r
   131→
   132→            Console.WriteLine(output)
   133→        | Error e ->
   134→            let output =
   135→                if format = "json" then
   136→                    JsonOutput.formatError e
   137→                else
   138→                    TextOutput.formatError e
   139→
   140→            Console.Error.WriteLine(output))
   141→
   142→    root.Subcommands.Add(validateCmd)
   143→
   144→    // ── diff ──
   145→    let diffCmd = Command("diff")
   146→    diffCmd.Description <- "Compare current extraction state with a previous snapshot"
   147→    let diffProjectOpt = Option<string>("--project")
   148→    diffProjectOpt.Description <- "Path to .fsproj file"
   149→    diffProjectOpt.Required <- true
   150→    let previousOpt = Option<string>("--previous")
   151→    previousOpt.Description <- "Path to previous state file (auto-detects latest backup if omitted)"
   152→    let diffFormatOpt = Option<string>("--format")
   153→    diffFormatOpt.Description <- "Output format (text|json)"
   154→    diffFormatOpt.DefaultValueFactory <- (fun _ -> "text")
   155→    diffCmd.Options.Add(diffProjectOpt)
   156→    diffCmd.Options.Add(previousOpt)
   157→    diffCmd.Options.Add(diffFormatOpt)
   158→
   159→    diffCmd.SetAction(fun parseResult ->
   160→        let project = parseResult.GetValue(diffProjectOpt)
   161→        let previous = parseResult.GetValue(previousOpt)
   162→        let format = parseResult.GetValue(diffFormatOpt)
   163→
   164→        let prevPath =
   165→            if String.IsNullOrEmpty previous then
   166→                None
   167→            else
   168→                Some previous
   169→
   170→        let result = DiffCommand.execute project prevPath
   171→
   172→        match result with
   173→        | Ok r ->
   174→            let output =
   175→                if format = "json" then
   176→                    JsonOutput.formatDiffResult r
   177→                else
   178→                    TextOutput.formatDiffResult r
   179→
   180→            Console.WriteLine(output)
   181→        | Error e ->
   182→            let output =
   183→                if format = "json" then
   184→                    JsonOutput.formatError e
   185→                else
   186→                    TextOutput.formatError e
   187→
   188→            Console.Error.WriteLine(output))
   189→
   190→    root.Subcommands.Add(diffCmd)
   191→
   192→    // ── compile ──
   193→    let compileCmd = Command("compile")
   194→    compileCmd.Description <- "Generate OWL/XML and SHACL artifacts from extraction state"
   195→    let compileProjectOpt = Option<string>("--project")
   196→    compileProjectOpt.Description <- "Path to .fsproj file"
   197→    compileProjectOpt.Required <- true
   198→    let outputDirOpt = Option<string>("--output-dir")
   199→    outputDirOpt.Description <- "Output directory for compiled artifacts"
   200→    let compileFormatOpt = Option<string>("--format")
   201→    compileFormatOpt.Description <- "Output format (text|json)"
   202→    compileFormatOpt.DefaultValueFactory <- (fun _ -> "text")
   203→    compileCmd.Options.Add(compileProjectOpt)
   204→    compileCmd.Options.Add(outputDirOpt)
   205→    compileCmd.Options.Add(compileFormatOpt)
   206→
   207→    compileCmd.SetAction(fun parseResult ->
   208→        let project = parseResult.GetValue(compileProjectOpt)
   209→        let outputDir = parseResult.GetValue(outputDirOpt)
   210→        let format = parseResult.GetValue(compileFormatOpt)
   211→
   212→        let outDir =
   213→            if String.IsNullOrEmpty outputDir then
   214→                None
   215→            else
   216→                Some outputDir
   217→
   218→        let result = CompileCommand.execute project outDir
   219→
   220→        match result with
   221→        | Ok r ->
   222→            let output =
   223→                if format = "json" then
   224→                    JsonOutput.formatCompileResult r
   225→                else
   226→                    TextOutput.formatCompileResult r
   227→
   228→            Console.WriteLine(output)
   229→        | Error e ->
   230→            let output =
   231→                if format = "json" then
   232→                    JsonOutput.formatError e
   233→                else
   234→                    TextOutput.formatError e
   235→
   236→            Console.Error.WriteLine(output))
   237→
   238→    root.Subcommands.Add(compileCmd)
   239→
   240→    let parseResult = root.Parse(args)
   241→    parseResult.Invoke()
   242→

1→namespace Frank.Datastar.Tests
     2→
     3→open System
     4→open System.Threading.Tasks
     5→open NUnit.Framework
     6→open Microsoft.Playwright
     7→
     8→/// Base class for all Playwright-based tests.
     9→/// Manages browser lifecycle and provides fresh page per test.
    10→[<AbstractClass>]
    11→type TestBase() =
    12→    let mutable playwright: IPlaywright = null
    13→    let mutable browser: IBrowser = null
    14→    let mutable context: IBrowserContext = null
    15→    let mutable page: IPage = null
    16→
    17→    let config = TestConfiguration.getConfig ()
    18→
    19→    /// The current page for this test
    20→    member _.Page = page
    21→
    22→    /// The browser context for this test
    23→    member _.Context = context
    24→
    25→    /// The configured base URL
    26→    member _.BaseUrl = config.BaseUrl
    27→
    28→    /// The configured timeout in milliseconds
    29→    member _.TimeoutMs = config.TimeoutMs
    30→
    31→    /// The sample being tested
    32→    member _.SampleName = config.SampleName
    33→
    34→    /// Launches the browser once per test fixture
    35→    [<OneTimeSetUp>]
    36→    member _.SetupBrowser() : Task =
    37→        task {
    38→            TestContext.WriteLine($"Testing sample: {config.SampleName}")
    39→            TestContext.WriteLine($"Base URL: {config.BaseUrl}")
    40→            TestContext.WriteLine($"Timeout: {config.TimeoutMs}ms")
    41→
    42→            let! pw = Playwright.CreateAsync()
    43→            playwright <- pw
    44→
    45→            // Check for headed mode
    46→            let headed =
    47→                Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("HEADED")
    48→                |> Option.ofObj
    49→                |> Option.map (fun s -> s = "1" || s.ToLower() = "true")
    50→                |> Option.defaultValue false
    51→
    52→            let! b = playwright.Chromium.LaunchAsync(BrowserTypeLaunchOptions(Headless = not headed))
    53→            browser <- b
    54→        }
    55→
    56→    /// Creates a fresh browser context and page for each test
    57→    [<SetUp>]
    58→    member _.SetupPage() : Task =
    59→        task {
    60→            let! ctx = browser.NewContextAsync()
    61→            context <- ctx
    62→
    63→            let! p = ctx.NewPageAsync()
    64→            page <- p
    65→
    66→            // Navigate to base URL and handle connection errors
    67→            try
    68→                let options = PageGotoOptions(Timeout = Nullable(float32 config.TimeoutMs))
    69→                let! _ = page.GotoAsync(config.BaseUrl, options)
    70→                ()
    71→            with ex ->
    72→                let message =
    73→                    $"Cannot connect to {config.BaseUrl}. Ensure the sample server is running: dotnet run --project sample/{config.SampleName}/"
    74→
    75→                raise (Exception(message, ex))
    76→        }
    77→
    78→    /// Closes page and context after each test
    79→    [<TearDown>]
    80→    member _.TeardownPage() : Task =
    81→        task {
    82→            if not (isNull page) then
    83→                do! page.CloseAsync()
    84→                page <- null
    85→
    86→            if not (isNull context) then
    87→                do! context.CloseAsync()
    88→                context <- null
    89→        }
    90→
    91→    /// Closes browser after all tests in fixture
    92→    [<OneTimeTearDown>]
    93→    member _.TeardownBrowser() =
    94→        if not (isNull browser) then
    95→            browser.CloseAsync() |> Async.AwaitTask |> Async.RunSynchronously
    96→            browser <- null
    97→
    98→        if not (isNull playwright) then
    99→            playwright.Dispose()
   100→            playwright <- null
   101→
